title: rhododendron lapponicum subsp. alpinum
intro: Rhododendron lapponicum subsp. alpinum, also known as the Arctic rhododendron or Lapland rosebay, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron lapponicum subsp. alpinum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
